archimate:Representation.name: Knowledge
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Definition: Knowledge ABB is a Representation that refers to a perceptible form of stored information in a human/artificial memory representing the understanding and awareness that a person has about a particular subject, topic, or area of study. Knowledge is generally context related.
Source: FREE DICTIONARY
Source reference: https://encyclopedia2.thefreedictionary.com/knowledge
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Core Vocabularies for public administration. https://joinup.ec.europa.eu/collection/semic-support-centre/core-vocabularies
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Semantic view
Viewpoint: Highlevel viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KnowledgeRepresentation
ABB name: eira:KnowledgeRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KnowledgeRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic

properties.value: Knowledge ABB is a Representation that refers to a perceptible form of stored information in a human/artificial memory representing the understanding and awareness that a person has about a particular subject, topic, or area of study. Knowledge is generally context related.

The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Core Vocabularies for public administration. https://joinup.ec.europa.eu/collection/semic-support-centre/core-vocabularies
